title: 30 DAY SHELTER - 211info
text: YAMHILL COUNTY GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION MEN'S FACILITY 30 DAY SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides 30-day short-term shelter. Services include a clothing closet, showers, and hygiene items. Shelter space is limited. Unaccompanied minors may be eligible for services with the permission of a guardian or law enforcement agency. 1234 NE 14th Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older who are single or have minor children. Guests may not use illegal drugs or alcohol during their stay. Animals are allowed. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week. Doors lock at 10pm. Email (503) 472-9766 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 472-9766 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: Community Shelters * Homeless Families Community Shelters * Homeless Men If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
